app.title: Sunday Pádel
app.openFromTelegram: Please open this app from Telegram.

groupPicker.title: Choose a group
groupPicker.subtitle: You belong to more than one group. Pick the one you want to open.
groupPicker.noGroups: You're not in any registered group yet. Open the app from a pinned group message.

errors.bad_signature: Telegram session could not be verified.
errors.expired: Telegram session expired. Reopen the app from Telegram.
errors.invalid_token: Your session has expired. Reopen the app.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Slow down and try again.
errors.cannot_leave_team: Teams can no longer be changed.
errors.not_a_team_member: You are not on this team.
errors.cosmos_unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
errors.not_admin: Only group admins can do that.
errors.not_a_member: You are not a member of this group anymore.
errors.group_required: Open the app from a group's pinned message.
errors.already_in_team: You are already in a team.
errors.partner_already_in_team: That player is already in a team.
errors.partner_not_registered: That player isn't registered to play.
errors.partner_is_self: Pick someone else as a partner.
errors.invalid_set_count: A match must have 2 or 3 sets.
errors.invalid_super_tiebreak: Super tie-break must be won by 10+ with a 2-point lead.
errors.no_winner: No winner — one team must win 2 sets.
errors.cannot_confirm_own_submission: The opposing team has to confirm.
errors.invalid_state: Not allowed in this tournament state.

tournament.none: No tournament is open right now.
tournament.endConfirm: End this tournament? No more matches can be submitted.

teams.title: Team
teams.nooneLooking: No one else is looking for a partner yet.
teams.leaveConfirm: Leave the team ({{name}})? Both of you will go back to the looking-for-teammate list.

live.notInTeam: You're not on a team — you can spectate.

overall.empty: No overall scores yet — end a tournament to start the ranking.
